titleStmt.title: SII 20.239: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 239. (B.K. No. 7 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒS11VAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall in the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Mārgasira, s11u. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1547 November 22, which was a Tuesday.

The inscription records the gifts, by the king, of taxes made to the barbers Timmōja, Raṁgōja and Bhadrōja who were brothers. The gift was made at the request of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja, to whom the barbers had made their request.
The king is stated to be ruling from Vidyānagari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbamūla staṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudaya śālivāhana sakhavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1469 neya plavaṁga saṁ
vatsarada mārggaṣira śu 10 lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
sadāśivarāyamahārāyarū vidyānagariya dharmasiṁhyāsanadalū dharmava pratipā
lisutirdda kāladalū tatpādapadmārādhakarumappa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarā
ja mahāarasugaḷige kaṁdanavaḷala nāvila tiṁmōjana makkaḷu tiṁmōja raṁgōja bha
drōja yī mūvaru Aṁṇataṁmiṁdiru biṁnahaṁ māḍikoṁḍu yī rāya
rāṣṭrada voḷage taṁma nāvilakulada yī birāḍava koḷutiddaru birāḍava sarvva
mānyavāgi biḍisikoḍabēkeṁdu biṁnaha māḍalāgi Ā biṁnahava pratipāli
si rāmarājamahāarasugaḷu rāyarige biṁnahaṁ māḍi śrī virūpākṣadēvaru
śrī viṭhaladēvara saṁnidhiyalu mūḍaṇa samudra deṁkaṇasamudra paḍuvaṇa
baḍagalu Agrahāra giridurga jala
durga vanadurga puravara yiṣṭu sīmeya voḷagaṇa nāvilaru prāku pūrvadalū teru
birāḍa Anatikāla cakrakāṇikekaḍāya sarvabādhaparihāravāgi bi
ṭṭeveṁdu paradattava māḍi prātyayika sīme sīmege śilāśāsanava barasi hu
ligeṟe lakṣumēśvarada sīmege vāgabēkeṁdu rāmarājayya
navaru śrīmanmahānāyakācāryya khānage salāgi mahā
prasādaveṁdu kaikoṁḍu dharṁmakāryava mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara nirūpa
mahāprasādaveṁdu kaikoṁḍu yidamū huligeṟeya
lakṣumaṇēśvarada nāḍa nūṟayippattu grāma Agrahāra dēvasthāna puradoḷaga
nāvilarige koṭṭa birāḍa kāṇike
birāḍa grāma kāṇike birāḍa yidake tapidare
lōka brahmalōkake salla kulake yidake sākṣiga ḷu rāyasiṁhyāsana
tappida
Digital edition of SII 20.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
